diagrams.title: Lossless-Join Decomposition Test Table
diagrams.description: The Chase/Join table method to test lossless-join property
elements: Table with rows for each decomposed relation (R1, R2...)
Columns for all attributes in original relation
Mark 'a' for attributes in relation's schema, 'b' for others
Apply FDs to replace 'b' with 'a' where possible
If any row becomes all 'a' values, decomposition is lossless
diagrams.purpose: Learn to verify if decomposition maintains original data without spurious tuples

diagrams.title: Normal Form Hierarchy Pyramid
elements: Arrows showing inclusion: higher forms include lower forms
diagrams.purpose: Understand that BCNF implies 3NF implies 2NF implies 1NF

diagrams.title: Decomposition Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Steps to decompose a relation to BCNF/3NF
elements: Start with relation and set of FDs
Check if relation in target normal form
